title: Craft Chain Gear
description: Minecraft mod that allowes you to craft chain gear!
body:
Tired of scavenging or looting for Chainmail Armor? With the Craft Chain Gear Mod, you can now craft your very own Chainmail Armor using simple materials! This mod introduces new crafting recipes for Chainmail Armor, allowing you to create the full set (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots) right from your crafting table.  

![Chain gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f805e3eb9e65cc7dc5278dcec7fdf3c18e725f_0.webp)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![helmet recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9cd725e4186f6b0f2a2df1f2bc3a0f3cc90db4f.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ
